fields.title: Migrate exa/ feature
fields.description:
Move exa extension to tau/src/exa/

## Source
- extensions/exa/src/index.ts

## Target
- extensions/tau/src/exa/index.ts

## Changes
- Export initExa(pi, state) function
- Keep tool names: web_search_exa, crawling_exa, get_code_context_exa
- Keep custom renderers

## DoD
- All 3 exa tools work
- Tool rendering works
- EXA_API_KEY env var handling unchanged
fields.close_reason: Copied exa tools into tau/src/exa (initExa) and wired into tau entrypoint
